variants: An esteemed member of Jester’s Canvas Co-op, Kaede Sakamoto specializes in landscape architecture. She knows the value of mentorship, having worked under the renowned Shanil Karmali throughout her studies. With her Obsidian Smithing Certificate as her professional license, Kaede has been able to connect her skill with her artistic vision. Her projects have received backing from the Basilisk Inspiration Fund, which enables her to push the boundaries of traditional landscape design. Her career is a testament to the combination of passion and expert training in her field.

Significant funding from the Basilisk Inspiration Fund has fueled her creative pursuits, allowing her to experiment with innovative concepts and solutions in her work. Through her dedication and expertise, she continues to leave a lasting impact on the landscapes she designs.
